title: Murray3
description: Late game armor and weapons with a few fun blocks.
body:
# Murray3
![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/500c0d6d23d30718cd2b4a25a4ce7a747fd041cc.png)
Murray3 has a ton of fun blocks with a bunch of options for late game armor. It's called Murray3 because it was suggested by my brother Murray, and it's 3 mods combined: EmmTech, Utility, and Minecatr's Random Stuff.
## Features
- 6 Plasma Rifles
- Enderium Ore
- True Netherite
- True Enderium
- 7 Different Chips for crafting
- Venus Dimension
- Corruption Dimension
- 4 New Mobs
- Particles
- Sandworm Block
- Cheap Ladders
- One Way Glass
- One Way Door
- Compressed Not Dynamite
- Computer
- Jarnum Leaves and Fruit
- Magnetite
- 20+ Armor Sets
- 2 Music Discs
- 5+ Melee Weapons
- 5+ Ranged Weapons
- MiniMill And MiniMill2
- The Sun In A Box - Infinite lava and energy
- Tree In A Box - Infinite Wood
- Scaffold - A Cheaper Alternate to Scaffolding
- Flight Enabler - Enables Flight in survival
